name: 4q21_microdeletion_PRDM8_FGF5
description: 4q21 recurrent microdeletion syndrome — ~1.4-13 Mb interstitial deletion of 4q21. Critical genes: PRKG2 (skeletal), RASGEF1B, HNRNPD, HNRPDL, AFF1 (ID gene), FGF5, BMP2K. Phenotype: severe ID, absent or delayed speech, marked growth retardation, distinctive facies, neonatal muscular hypotonia. Some breakpoints recurrent at flanking SD blocks at 4q21.21 and 4q21.23.

architecture.internal_structure: Flanking SD blocks of ~30-100 kb at >95% identity; unique core contains PRKG2, RASGEF1B, HNRNPD, HNRPDL, AFF1 (primary dosage gene for ID), FGF5, BMP2K, PPEF2, NUDT9, SDAD1, MRPS18C, SCD5.

related_diseases: 4q21 microdeletion syndrome (severe ID, absent speech, growth retardation)
